attacking_style: Pure finisher, not an attacker. Sprint launches typically 250-300m out, earlier than modern positioning sprinters, relying on sustained power to hold the line rather than late acceleration.
team_tactics: Completely dependent on elite lead-out infrastructure, particularly MØRKØV. Team positions him at front 300m+ out to avoid technical chaos. Without perfect pilot through final kilometer, positioning consistently fails. Team also burns domestiques chasing intermediate sprint points for green jersey campaigns.
terrain_preference: Pan-flat sprints with straightforward finales. Any gradient over 3-4% sustained eliminates him. Technical circuits and wet conditions expose bike handling vulnerabilities. Excels on ceremonial/prestige sprints where motivation peaks.
vulnerability: Dropped on any categorized climb, even Category 3. Catastrophically reliant on lead-out train—without MØRKØV or equivalent, stranded mid-peloton by 2km. Positioning errors in crashes (8+ observed incidents). Equipment failures at critical moments (mechanicals, punctures final 2km). Declining raw sprint speed post-2021 requires perfect positioning to compensate.
key_patterns: Launch timing 250-300m out, earlier than modern sprinters, compensating speed decline with positioning (4 observations)
Crashes/mechanicals in final 3km frequently eliminate from contention, positioning vulnerability under pressure (8+ incidents)
Dropped on any sustained climb over 3-4%, even with team support (5 observations)
Without elite lead-out pilot, positioned mid-peloton by 2km, especially post-Quick-Step era (4 observations)
Form peaks for prestige targets: Tour stages, Merckx record chase, ceremonial finales show elevated motivation (6 observations)
Team chases intermediate sprint points aggressively for green jersey, burning domestique resources beyond stage finish (3 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows infrastructure collapse at Astana—multiple positioning failures despite residual speed. 2021 peak form with Quick-Step unrepeatable without MØRKØV-level lead-out. Age 37+ decline evident in need for perfect setup versus raw power.
